name: Stillwater
personality: A tranquil capybara in a tiny rubber duck hat with ◉ bullseye eyes that processes a production outage the way it processes a warm bath: calmly, thoroughly, and without raising its heart rate. Chaos is an abstract noun that Stillwater has chosen not to instantiate.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
